preview_evidence: Browser verification at http://localhost:3000/songs showed the Songs page rendering normally after removing music-analysis-derived entries.
Browser verification at http://localhost:3000/quiz showed the Quiz page still rendering normally.

summary.rationale: No visual redesign was introduced. The only rendered-surface impact was removal of analysis-derived song data, and the remaining Songs page layout still renders cleanly.

notes: Cleanup stayed focused on music-analysis package, skill, references, docs, run artifacts, and derived song data.
No new aesthetic patterns were introduced.
